meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no testing knowledge (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no testing knowledge. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Pricing & Testing Strategy Guide
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing and bridge testing gaps. Use this intermediate checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship high-quality, profitable software faster.
content.answer_block: Eliminate the fear of testing by adopting a 'Pricing-as-Contract' model. By defining your SaaS pricing tiers based on specific usage limits, you create natural test boundaries. Use Antigravity to scaffold these constraints and Claude Code to enforce unit tests, ensuring your billing logic never breaks under production load.
content.intro:
You have built the feature, the client is waiting, and the deadline is breathing down your neck. But a cold sweat sets in: you have no robust test suite, and the pricing logic is a fragile house of cards. One wrong calculation, and your client loses revenue—or worse, your reputation.

Stop relying on manual verification. As a freelance builder, your competitive advantage is speed, but your sustainability is built on reliability. We are going to transform your pricing logic into a hardened, testable asset, allowing you to ship with the confidence of a lead engineer without spending weeks on QA.

steps.title: Define Pricing Constraints as Schema
steps.description: Convert your pricing tiers into a strictly typed schema. This creates the 'source of truth' for your tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my pricing requirements and generate a Zod schema that defines tier limits, usage costs, and billing intervals for a SaaS platform.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --schema-file pricing_schema.ts --from-requirements 'monthly tiers for Pro and Enterprise plans'

steps.title: Automate Billing Logic Generation
steps.description: Use AI to write the core pricing engine based on your schema to ensure parity between requirements and code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust pricing engine function that calculates costs based on the provided Zod schema. Include edge case handling for mid-month upgrades.

steps.title: Generate Behavior-Driven Tests
steps.description: Create automated tests that verify your pricing logic against the schema constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the pricing engine, focusing on boundary testing for tier limits and prorated billing calculations.

steps.title: Integrate Production Guardrails
steps.description: Implement runtime checks to ensure no user can exceed their tier without a trigger event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware function that validates user usage against the pricing schema before allowing database write operations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'add usage_guard middleware to API routes'

steps.title: Continuous Validation Loop
steps.description: Set up a CLI command to run your suite every time you modify the pricing structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD script that runs the pricing test suite and validates the schema against current database records.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm test -- --coverage' and verify output

pro_tips: Always mock your Stripe or billing provider SDKs in unit tests to avoid hitting live APIs during development cycles.
Use 'Property-Based Testing' (like fast-check) to inject random usage numbers into your pricing engine and find edge cases you didn't anticipate.
Treat your pricing schema as a public-facing API contract; never change it without incrementing a version number in your database.
Implement 'Audit Logs' for every pricing calculation; if a client disputes an invoice, you need a traceable record of the calculation logic used at that timestamp.
Build a 'Dry Run' mode in your dashboard that allows you to calculate hypothetical billing scenarios for clients before they commit to a tier.
content.next_steps: Deploy your validated pricing engine to a staging environment and run a smoke test with mock user data to verify that all tier limits correctly trigger the expected billing events.
content.conversion_block: Stop stressing about broken logic and start delivering professional-grade SaaS products that scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
